content:
I won against a person in Traphase. They immediately requested a rematch and I accepted it. I went first this time. I reshuffled my hand. The countdown starts. My cards are inactive (no blue outline). I lose the game when the countdown ends and they send "honorable opponent".

I have also recorded a comparison between this bugged match and a normal one. You can clearly see that the bugged match ended in 20 seconds of me being inactive while the normal one did not end in 20s and I even had 18 more seconds to spare and play my cards.


Traphase-All Pick Mode Battle Replay

Bohday（100858774）
A Mouse's Wisdom, Wanda, Tawil, Liz, Karen
The Final Vow, Blue Stone Throne, Elevated Focus, To My Dearest Friend, Queen's Edict
---------------VS----------------
莎樂美（100725688）
Beachside Memento, Sorel, Kathigu-Ra, Sanga, Ramona
Void Hues, Million Loving Gaze, Blade of the Titan, Amidst the Downpour, Annihilated Rebirth

cfdd1147-4172-3143-b56b-1a23fc6764a8#P#nPpRQ
I would suggest looking into the person's Traphase match history to see whether this bug occurred before
